title: No Java source files produced — agent generated only project scaffolding
evidence: find rep3/src -name '*.java' returns 0 files; only pom.xml, README.md, .gitignore, and src/test/resources/application.properties exist
suggestion: Agent must generate Java source files (controllers, models, repositories, application class) to implement the API

title: POST /books endpoint missing — no controller code
evidence: No .java files in src/; no BookController or equivalent
suggestion: Create a Spring Boot @RestController with @PostMapping for /books

title: GET /books list endpoint missing — no controller code
evidence: No .java files in src/; no list endpoint implementation

title: GET /books ?author= filter missing — no controller code
evidence: No .java files in src/; no query parameter handling

title: GET /books/{id} endpoint missing — no controller code
evidence: No .java files in src/; no get-by-id implementation

title: PUT /books/{id} endpoint missing — no controller code
evidence: No .java files in src/; no update implementation

title: DELETE /books/{id} endpoint missing — no controller code
evidence: No .java files in src/; no delete implementation

title: SQLite configured in pom.xml and application.properties but no JPA entities or repositories
evidence: pom.xml:31 sqlite-jdbc dependency; src/test/resources/application.properties configures jdbc:sqlite — but no @Entity or @Repository classes exist
suggestion: Create Book entity and BookRepository to use the configured SQLite datasource

title: No JSON responses or HTTP status codes — no controllers exist
evidence: No .java files in src/; no @ResponseStatus or ResponseEntity usage
suggestion: Implement controllers returning ResponseEntity with appropriate status codes

title: Input validation missing — no validation code
evidence: No .java files in src/; spring-boot-starter-validation in pom.xml but no @Valid or @NotBlank annotations
suggestion: Add @Valid on request body and @NotBlank on title/author fields

title: GET /health endpoint missing — no controller code
evidence: No .java files in src/; no HealthController or actuator configuration
suggestion: Create a /health endpoint returning status JSON

title: No tests — zero test files exist
evidence: No .java files in src/test/; only src/test/resources/application.properties exists
suggestion: Create at least 3 integration tests using @SpringBootTest and MockMvc
